programme.title: Race 2 - DTM - Norisring Round
programme.desc: The DTM heads to the Norisring in Nuremberg for two races on one of the championship’s most iconic street circuits. The tight layout, heavy braking zones, and short lap create close battles, where qualifying, race strategy, and precision driving are crucial across both races.

programme.title: Race 1 - Vallelunga Round - Formula 4 Italy - 2026
programme.desc: The Italian F4 Championship heads to Vallelunga for another competitive round on the technical circuit near Rome. With a mix of challenging corners and limited room for error, the young drivers will need strong pace, precision, and consistency as they fight for valuable championship points.

Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Valladolid P2
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.desc: Five-ton race trucks storm the 4.185 km Bugatti Circuit in four combative sprints. programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025
programme.desc: Live and exclusive only on beIN, the Coupe de France, also referred to as the French Cup, is the premier knockout cup competition in French football organised by the French Football Federation (FF). programme.title: Lens vs Nice - Coupe de France Final's 2025

programme.title: Zamalek SC (EGY) vs USMA (ALG) - CAF Confederation Cup 2025/26 - Finals

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: FAR Rabat (MAR) vs Mamelodi Sundowns (RSA) - CAF Champions League 2025/26 - Final

It is the most prestigious club competition in African football and is live and exclusive only on beIN. The current champions are Pyramids Football Club from Egypt.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Plava Laguna Croatia Open Umag 2026
programme.desc: The Plava Laguna Croatia Open Umag 2026 is Croatia’s only ATP tournament, staged from 13 to 18 July on outdoor clay in Umag. An ATP 250 event with €612,620 in prize money, it brings Tour-level tennis to the Adriatic coast as players compete for the title at one of Croatia’s longest-running tennis events.

Mexico vs South Africa - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Mexico and South Africa will repeat the opening fixture of the 2010 FIFA World Cup – exactly 16 years after their 1-1 draw in Johannesburg. It’s the first time an opening fixture has ever been repeated from the 19 previous single-match World Cup openers. Estadio Azteca is hosting its 20th FIFA World Cup match, more than any other stadium in the his

programme.title: South Korea vs Czech Republic - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the first FIFA World Cup encounter between Korea Republic and Czechia. Their three previous meetings all came in friendlies, resulting in one win apiece and one draw. programme.title: United States vs Paraguay - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be the second FIFA World Cup meeting between the United States and Paraguay. Their only previous encounter came in 1930, when USA won 3-0 – a match that featured the first hat-trick in World Cup history, scored by Bert Patenaude. It is also the USA’s joint-largest win at the competition. The 2026 FIFA World Cup will be the USA’s 12th appe

programme.title: Qatar vs Switzerland - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: This will be Qatar and Switzerland’s first FIFA World Cup meeting. Their only previous encounter came in a November 2018 friendly in Lugano – Qatar won 1-0 thanks to an Akram Afif goal. programme.title: Brazil vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Brazil and Morocco will meet at the FIFA World Cup for the second time, after a 3-0 win for Brazil in the 1998 group stage – a match that featured Ronaldo and Rivaldo’s first World Cup goals. Brazil and Morocco’s only encounter since their last FIFA World Cup meeting was in a March 2023 friendly, in Tunisia – it ended 2-1 to Morocco.

programme.title: France vs Senegal - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: France and Senegal are meeting at the FIFA World Cup for the second time. programme.title: Ecuador vs Germany - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group Stage
programme.desc: Germany have won their two previous encounters with Ecuador - 3-0 in the group stage of the 2006 World Cup and 4-2 in a May 2013 friendly which was played in Boca Raton, Florida.
